user.title: Connect to Soterra
user.description: Enter the webhook URL from your property's Smart Home tab in the Soterra app.

data_description.webhook_url: Paste the full URL from Soterra (starts with https://)

devices.title: Select Safety Devices
devices.description: These are the devices on your network that have safety sensors (smoke, CO, gas, heat, or leak). Select the ones installed at this Soterra property.

error.invalid_url: Webhook URL must start with https://
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Soterra webhook. Check the URL and try again.
error.no_devices: Please select at least one device to monitor.

abort.already_configured: This Soterra webhook is already configured.
abort.no_safety_devices: No safety devices found. Soterra monitors binary_sensor entities with device classes: smoke, carbon_monoxide, gas, heat, moisture.

init.title: Monitored Devices
init.description: Add or remove devices. Changes take effect immediately — Soterra will receive an updated device inventory.
